query:
SELECT e.id, e.actionId, e.status, e.descricao, e.createdAt 
FROM evidences e 
LEFT JOIN actions a ON e.actionId = a.id 
WHERE a.id IS NULL 
ORDER BY e.createdAt DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.671da1035469 --database Uksxtg83ZJDkZPJL3fCmwT --execute SELECT e.id, e.actionId, e.status, e.descricao, e.createdAt 
FROM evidences e 
LEFT JOIN actions a ON e.actionId = a.id 
WHERE a.id IS NULL 
ORDER BY e.createdAt DESC;
